_comment: Curated single-image campaign creatives. content_id pins the copy mapping (config/captions_singleimage.json + Notion 'Image N' rows), decoupled from Drive filenames. The service account must have READ access to each file_id. Built via: adbot build --manifest config/single_image_manifest.json --state-key entities_images --label 'Single-Image' --start-time <iso> (PAUSED).
